function.name: read_context
function.description: Read surrounding lines or a bounded full-file slice from one local file. Use this after search_code when you need more context around a selected match.

path.description: File path to read. Prefer project-relative paths returned by search_code.

line_number.description: 1-based line number to read around. Required unless full is true.

before.description: Number of lines to read before line_number. Null uses the tool default.

after.description: Number of lines to read after line_number. Null uses the tool default.

full.description: Whether to read a bounded slice from the start of the whole file.

max_lines.description: Maximum lines to return. Null uses the tool default.

max_chars.description: Maximum total line characters to return. Null uses the tool default.

encoding.description: Text encoding for reading the file. Usually utf-8.
